item.title: GE Medical Systems, LLC: Revolution CT ES, X-ray Computed Tomography, Model Number 5590000-15 Recall
item.product: Revolution CT ES, X-ray Computed Tomography, Model Number 5590000-15
item.summary: GE HealthCare has become aware of a potential security vulnerability impacting AW Server deployed via Edison Health Link (EHL) based CT Smart Subscription used in conjunction with certain Revolution Apex, Revolution Ascend, and Revolution CT systems. Product details: Revolution CT ES, X-ray Computed Tomography, Model Number 5590000-15
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
